retrieved_docs.title: North Atlantic Treaty
retrieved_docs.content: The North Atlantic Treaty established NATO and created a framework for collective defense among member states.

retrieved_docs.title: NATO
retrieved_docs.content: NATO stands for the North Atlantic Treaty Organization. It was founded in 1949 as a collective defense alliance.
